pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 39, 69, 80, 112 and export_result.sh line 21 consistently reference this path for the source document
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 23-26 create the Customer-Portal section at this path, and export_result.sh line 26 fetches the public proxy from this path
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 29-31 create the Engineering-Internal section at this path, and export_result.sh line 30 fetches the internal proxy from this path
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 89 stages the internal draft file with this exact filename at /home/ga/nuxeo/data/Titanium_X_Internal_Draft.pdf

privileged_info_summary: This task manages versioned publications in Nuxeo Platform. The source document 'Titanium-X-Specs' is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Titanium-X-Specs. Two proxy documents are created in sections: one in /default-domain/sections/Customer-Portal for public-facing content and one in /default-domain/sections/Engineering-Internal for internal technical specifications. The task demonstrates a split-horizon publication pattern where the same document is published in different versions to different sections. The internal draft file used is named Titanium_X_Internal_Draft.pdf and is sourced from local synthetic PDF files (annual_report_2023.pdf and project_proposal.pdf) stored in the environment data directory.
